summary: Captured one settled launch-surface screenshot per supported locale (19 PNGs) using the idb-first harness with the documented --allow-simctl-screenshot-fallback path. Preserved under automation/proofs/app-localization-all-locale-screenshot-proof/ with README and manifest.json (sha256 + bytes per file). Each capture flow used idb to terminate Owlory, relaunch with --owlory-ui-testing -AppleLanguages (<locale>) -AppleLocale <locale>, settle, dismiss any notification prompt via idb ui describe-all + idb ui tap, and assert SETTLED_SURFACE_LABEL='Today' was present. simctl handled the final PNG capture because the installed fb-idb client lacks a screenshot subcommand. proof_level achieved: screenshot-verified for the launch surface of all 19 locales.

contract_status_changes.before: Blocked. The idb-first capture harness existed (localization-screenshot-proof-idb-harness), but no captured artifact existed under automation/proofs/app-localization-all-locale-screenshot-proof/. localization-translation-quality.md and roadmap-status.md listed the all-locale screenshot proof as blocked.
contract_status_changes.after: Implemented. 19 settled launch-surface PNGs preserved under automation/proofs/app-localization-all-locale-screenshot-proof/ with README and manifest.json (sha256 + bytes). proof_level: screenshot-verified for the launch surface only. localization-translation-quality.md, roadmap-status.md, and validation.md now reflect the captured artifact.

residual_risks: Non-English locales currently render English placeholder text because non-en.lproj Localizable.strings values are still copies of the English source. These screenshots prove launch settling per locale; they do not prove visible localized strings beyond reviewed German values.

The --allow-simctl-screenshot-fallback path was needed because the installed fb-idb client lacks an idb screenshot subcommand. Future runs on a machine with a newer idb may drop the fallback flag; the proof harness still requires idb to own launch, describe, and prompt dismissal.

Re-running the capture against a non-empty output directory is intentionally blocked by the helper. Cleaning the directory before retry is the operator's responsibility; this avoids mingling fresh and stale screenshots.
This proof does not claim Dynamic Type, RTL pseudolocalization, on-device renderer behavior, or App Store production behavior. Those remain separate lanes.

The German screenshot reflects placeholder text for keys that have not yet been ingested via app-localization-first-locale-review-intake; only reviewed keys are visible in localized form once that slice ships.
recommended_next_reason: Clean stop is valid. The remaining blocked slice is app-localization-first-locale-review-intake, which still waits on reviewed German translation values with reviewer/status metadata. No queued slice is eligible after this completes.
